headline: AI EntityMap
summary: A new open standard called EntityMap allows businesses to provide AI systems with a structured view of their organization. This can help local businesses improve their online presence and visibility.
body: EntityMap is a proposed open standard that enables businesses to provide AI systems with a structured view of their organization.
This standard allows businesses to define their entities, such as people, places, and things, and provide evidence for these entities.
By adopting EntityMap, local businesses can improve their online presence and visibility, making it easier for customers to find them.
insight: Local businesses can benefit from adopting EntityMap by providing AI systems with a clear understanding of their organization, which can improve their online visibility and presence.

headline: Google Zero Concerns
summary: Google CEO Sundar Pichai downplays concerns about Google Zero, stating that low-quality clicks are being filtered out. This can impact local businesses' online visibility and advertising strategies.
body: Google CEO Sundar Pichai has downplayed concerns about Google Zero, a feature that allows users to access information without clicking on a website.
Pichai stated that low-quality clicks are being filtered out, which can impact local businesses' online visibility and advertising strategies.
Local businesses should monitor their online presence and adjust their advertising strategies accordingly to ensure they are reaching their target audience.
insight: Local businesses should focus on creating high-quality content and advertising strategies that target their audience effectively, as low-quality clicks are being filtered out by Google.

headline: Reviews As Infrastructure
summary: A study found that treating reviews as business infrastructure, rather than marketing, drives real business results. This highlights the importance of review management for local businesses.
body: A recent study found that star ratings alone do not predict small business performance, but active review management does.
This study highlights the importance of treating reviews as business infrastructure, rather than just marketing.
Local businesses should prioritize review management and respond to customer feedback to improve their online reputation and drive business results.
insight: Local businesses should prioritize review management and respond to customer feedback to improve their online reputation and drive business results, as it is a key factor in driving real business outcomes.

headline: Link Intent
summary: Link intent combines great content with strategic outreach to build links, referral traffic, and AI search visibility. This can help local businesses improve their online presence and visibility.
body: Link intent is a strategy that combines authoritative content with strategic outreach to build links, referral traffic, and AI search visibility.
This approach can help local businesses improve their online presence and visibility by creating high-quality content and building relationships with other websites.
By focusing on link intent, local businesses can increase their online visibility and drive more traffic to their website.
insight: Local businesses should focus on creating high-quality content and building relationships with other websites to improve their online presence and visibility, using link intent as a key strategy.

headline: Schema Markup
summary: Schema markup supports the emerging agentic web by providing AI agents with structured data to understand and act on content. This can help local businesses improve their online presence and visibility.
body: Schema markup is a way to provide AI agents with structured data to understand and act on content.
This can help local businesses improve their online presence and visibility by providing search engines with more information about their business.
By using schema markup, local businesses can increase their online visibility and drive more traffic to their website.
insight: Local businesses should use schema markup to provide search engines with more information about their business, which can help improve their online presence and visibility.

headline: AI Performance Report
summary: Google is adding an AI performance report to Merchant Center, which will give ecommerce brands insights into how they appear across AI-powered shopping experiences. This can help local businesses optimize their online presence and advertising strategies.
body: Google is adding an AI performance report to Merchant Center, which will provide ecommerce brands with insights into how they appear across AI-powered shopping experiences.
This report will help local businesses optimize their online presence and advertising strategies to better reach their target audience.
By monitoring their AI performance, local businesses can make data-driven decisions to improve their online visibility and drive more sales.
insight: Local businesses should monitor their AI performance report in Merchant Center to optimize their online presence and advertising strategies, and make data-driven decisions to improve their online visibility and drive more sales.

headline: Preferred Sources
summary: Google is bringing Preferred Sources to AI Overviews and AI Mode, which can impact local businesses' online visibility and advertising strategies. This feature allows users to prioritize certain sources of information.
body: Google is bringing Preferred Sources to AI Overviews and AI Mode, which allows users to prioritize certain sources of information.
This feature can impact local businesses' online visibility and advertising strategies, as users may prioritize certain sources over others.
Local businesses should monitor their online presence and adjust their advertising strategies accordingly to ensure they are reaching their target audience.
insight: Local businesses should monitor their online presence and adjust their advertising strategies accordingly to ensure they are reaching their target audience, as Preferred Sources can impact their online visibility and advertising effectiveness.

headline: AI Content Loses Trust
summary: Consumers prefer AI-generated content until they know it's AI, causing trust to drop sharply. Local businesses should be aware of the potential risks of using AI-generated content.
body: A recent study found that consumers often prefer AI-generated content when it is unlabeled.
However, once they learn that the content was created by AI, trust drops sharply, which could impact local businesses' marketing efforts.
Local businesses should consider the potential risks and benefits of using AI-generated content in their marketing strategies.
insight: Local businesses should be transparent about their use of AI-generated content to maintain trust with their customers.

headline: TikTok Algorithm
summary: Understanding the TikTok algorithm can help local businesses improve their visibility on the platform. The algorithm ranks content based on various factors, including user engagement and content quality.
body: The TikTok algorithm is constantly evolving, making it challenging for local businesses to keep up.
However, by understanding how the algorithm works, local businesses can optimize their content to increase their reach and engagement.
Local businesses can use this knowledge to create effective TikTok marketing strategies that drive sales and growth.
insight: Local businesses should focus on creating high-quality, engaging content that resonates with their target audience to improve their visibility on TikTok.

headline: Social Media Image Sizes
summary: The most recent social media image sizes for different platforms, including Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok, can help local businesses optimize their visual content.
body: Using the correct image sizes can improve the visibility and engagement of local businesses' social media posts.
Local businesses can use this information to create visually appealing content that resonates with their target audience.
By optimizing their image sizes, local businesses can enhance their social media marketing efforts and drive more sales.
insight: Local businesses should ensure they use the correct image sizes for each social media platform to maximize their visual content's impact.

headline: Social Media Competitor Analysis
summary: A social media competitor analysis can help local businesses identify gaps in their strategy and stay ahead of the competition.
body: Conducting a social media competitor analysis can provide valuable insights into local businesses' marketing efforts.
By analyzing their competitors' strengths and weaknesses, local businesses can refine their own social media strategies.
This can help local businesses improve their online presence, engagement, and ultimately, drive more sales.
insight: Local businesses should conduct regular social media competitor analyses to stay informed and adapt their marketing strategies accordingly.

headline: CTV Partnerships
summary: CTV partnerships with creators are becoming more enticing for brands due to hyper-engaged audiences. Local businesses can leverage CTV for targeted advertising.
body: The rise of CTV has led to new opportunities for brands to partner with creators, such as Dhar Mann, to reach hyper-engaged audiences.
With lightning-fast production and a finger on the cultural pulse, CTV partnerships can help brands stay ahead of the curve.
For local businesses, CTV can be a valuable tool for targeted advertising, allowing them to reach specific audiences and increase brand awareness.
insight: Local businesses can explore CTV partnerships to reach targeted audiences and increase brand awareness, and should consider working with creators who have a strong connection to their niche.
